summary: Tested ad monetization features (StickyBannerAd, InFeedAd), Decode Any Date page, navigation, and silver theme. All 16 new tests pass. All 37 existing regression tests also pass (core-flows: 11, secondary-features: 9, main-feature: 17).

issues: The silver/platinum theme update does not appear visually different from the previous dark blue theme — UI is still showing deep navy/dark background. The CSS variable changes may be subtle or incomplete. No functional regression, just design feedback.
Decode page title 'Decode Any Date' uses a serif/small-caps style font that may be intentional but worth reviewing for brand consistency.

action_items: Optional: If silver/platinum theme needs stronger visual differentiation, review CSS variables in App.css or index.css — screenshots show mostly dark navy, not silver/platinum.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New spec file: /app/tests/e2e/ads-decode.spec.ts covers sticky banner ads on Dashboard/History/Decode, in-feed ads in History (conditional on 5+ entries), Decode Any Date full flow (navigation, date input, preset buttons, result cards - Day Officer, Business Day, Day Energy, Lucky Number, Lucky Color, Good For/Avoid), and silver theme checks. Test user: test@astro.com / test123. All 4 spec files pass. Total: 53 tests passing.
